parameters.content:
## Outreach.io — LIST SEQUENCES (export to file)

One-off helper to fetch your real sequences so we can define the SEQUENCE_MAP.

RUN:
1. "Outreach: Get Sequences" is pre-wired to the "Outreach Sequence" OAuth2 credential.
2. Click "Test workflow".
3. On "Sequences -> File", open the output and DOWNLOAD outreach_sequences.json.
4. Send that file back for analysis -> we map each sequence_id to region + pillar.

Pagination is OFF (page[size]=1000 returns all ~15 sequences in one request).
Read-only: this workflow does NOT write to the database.
